sourceAmbiguity: Saved-context restore could rely on local browser cache alone.
decisionTaken: SavedContextResolver consumes DraftContinuityEvidenceProjection and marks localCacheOnlyRestoreForbidden true.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Restore must use authoritative draft continuity and promotion truth.
operationalRisk: Real API wiring must preserve the same projection fields.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Replace fixture projections with gateway-sourced projections without changing route semantics.
